case_title: EVA, MARY et al VS CROWDER, JOE JR. et al

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,700.00 FILED BY EVA, MARY SMITH, EUGENE F. AS TO DEFENDANT CROWDER, JOE JR. CROWDER, MABLE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-10-1994 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 02
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL
CERT. RECEIPT TO JOE CROWDER RETURNED SIGNED.

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF EVA, MARY SMITH, EUGENE F. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CROWDER, JOE JR. $2,700.00 PRINCIPAL, $20.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,720.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
CERTF.MAIL TO MABLE CROWDER RETURNED UNCLAIMED.
PETITION OF JUDGMENT CREDITOR TO SET ASIDE TERMS FOR PAYMENT OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF EVA, MARY SMITH, EUGENE F.
ORDER TO SET ASIDE TERMS FILED BY PLAINTIFF EVA, MARY SMITH, EUGENE F.
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $1,200.00 CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED AS TO DEFENDANT CROWDER, JOE JR.
MOTION RECONSIDERATION FILED BY PLAINTIFF SMITH, EUGENE F. HEARING SET FOR AUG-23-1994 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 02
SC MOTION DISPOSITION MOTION RECONSIDERATION OF AUG-23-1994, GRANTED
DEFT MABLE CROWDER APPEARED IN COURT ON 1/10/94, AGREED TO A JUDGMENT FOR BOTH DEFT'S & SET FORTH A SUGGESTED SCHEDULED WHICH WAS ACCEPTED BY PLFTS'.
ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED AS TO DEFENDANT CROWDER, JOE JR. HEARING SET FOR DEC-07-1994 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT 06
